languages.text: Генетор Ферренц может знать, что нужно для установки уникальных имплантов. Его можно найти в Секторе Бионика.
Genetor Ferrenz may know the requirements for fitting unique augmentations. He can be found in the Sector Bionica.
languages.original_text: Генетор Ферренц может знать, что нужно для установки уникальных имплантов. Его можно найти в Секторе Бионика.

traits.locale_text: Genetor Ferrenz may know the requirements for fitting unique augmentations. He can be found in the Sector Bionica.
Genetor Ferrenz may know the requirements for fitting unique augmentations. He can be found in the Sector Bionica.
Genetor Ferrenz may know the requirements for fitting unique augmentations. He can be found in the Sector Bionica.

languages.text: ジェネーター・フェレンツは、ユニークな増幅器の装着に必要な知識を持っているかもしれません。彼はセクター・ビオニカにいるはずです。
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz may know the requirements for fitting unique augmentations. He can be found in the Sector Bionica.

traits.locale_text: ジェネーター・フェレンツは、ユニークな増幅器の装着に必要な知識を持っているかもしれません。彼はセクター・ビオニカにいるはずです。

languages.text: Tal vez el genetor Ferrenz conozca los requisitos para instalar aumentos únicos. Está en el Sector Bionica.
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz may know the requirements for fitting unique augmentations. He can be found in the Sector Bionica.

traits.locale_text: Tal vez el genetor Ferrenz conozca los requisitos para instalar aumentos únicos. Está en el Sector Bionica.

languages.text: 基因士费伦茨或许了解安装特殊植入物的具体要求。可以去仿生区找他。
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz may know the requirements for fitting unique augmentations. He can be found in the Sector Bionica.

traits.locale_text: 基因士费伦茨或许了解安装特殊植入物的具体要求。可以去仿生区找他。

languages.text: Genetor Ferrenz kennt möglicherweise die Voraussetzungen für die Anpassung einzigartiger Augmentationen. Er ist in Sektor Bionica zu finden.
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz may know the requirements for fitting unique augmentations. He can be found in the Sector Bionica.

traits.locale_text: Genetor Ferrenz kennt möglicherweise die Voraussetzungen für die Anpassung einzigartiger Augmentationen. Er ist in Sektor Bionica zu finden.

languages.text: Genetör Ferrenz, eşsiz ogmentasyonları takmak için gerekenleri biliyor olabilir. Onu Sektör Biyonika'da bulabilirsin.
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz may know the requirements for fitting unique augmentations. He can be found in the Sector Bionica.

traits.locale_text: Genetör Ferrenz, eşsiz ogmentasyonları takmak için gerekenleri biliyor olabilir. Onu Sektör Biyonika'da bulabilirsin.

languages.text: Le genetor Ferrenz saura peut-être vous dire comment installer des augmentations uniques. Vous le trouverez dans le secteur Bionica.
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz may know the requirements for fitting unique augmentations. He can be found in the Sector Bionica.

traits.locale_text: Le genetor Ferrenz saura peut-être vous dire comment installer des augmentations uniques. Vous le trouverez dans le secteur Bionica.
